summary: Added flow-field ribbon shader variant (US-063). Created vertex shader using curl3 noise for divergence-free flow advection with bass-modulated speed and treble-modulated turbulence. Fragment shader renders elongated elliptical sprites via vElongation varying for tendril/aurora aesthetic. Geometry system seeds streamline-based point clusters with deterministic PRNG. Registered FLOWRIBBON_ATTRIBUTES in shaderRegistry, added maxFlowRibbonPoints to QualityProfile (low=200, medium=700, high=1600), and registered flowribbon mode in ModeManager. All 35 new tests pass, full suite 1387/1387 green.
